title: Fushia Twilight Hand Dyed Baby Alpaca Yarn
description: This lovely hand dyed yarn is 100% baby alpaca and is as soft as can be! It is hand dyed in fushias, purples, grays and white. There is 108 yards per skein in this bulky weight yarn. Only 3 skeins of this limited dye lot were made!

title: Spearmint Blush Hand Dyed Baby Alpaca Yarn
description: This lovely hand dyed yarn is 100% baby alpaca and is as soft as can be! It is hand dyed in spearmint green and peach blush. There is 108 yards per skein in this bulky weight yarn. Only 3 skeins of this limited dye lot were made!

title: Alpaca Dryer Ball
description: Did you know dryer sheets are one of the most chemically laden household objects? Our all-natural, hypoallergenic alpaca dryer balls are an excellent, environmentally friendly alternative! They bounce around the dryer helping to soften fabric, reduce static, wrinkles and drying time! For the best results, you want at least 2 dryer balls and up to 5! (We use 4 here!) If you like scented things, you can place a few drops of your favorite essential oil on the balls occasionally! Dryer balls are sold individually.

title: Premium Alpaca Golf Socks
description: The Premium Sport Golf Socks are crafted from a base yarn of 70% alpaca and 30% acrylic, delivering natural softness, warmth, and durability. Designed for sports performance, they feature a cuff detail and an elastic band across the instep for a secure fit. The sole, heel, and toe are reinforced with dense terry cushioning, offering comfort and shock absorption. The ankle area remains light and breathable, ensuring freshness and flexibility. Composition: 54% Alpaca / 23% Acrylic / 17% Spandex / 4% Elastic / 2% Nylon Weight: 1.8 oz.

description: Mid-weight Fingerless Gloves are perfect for tasks requiring a sure fingered grip or cellphone use.When you want the warmth of alpaca, but require the practical use of your fingers, the Fingerless Glove is a great option.

title: Hiking Alpaca Extreme Sport Crew Length Sock
description: ✅ NEW AND IMPROVED HIKING SOCKS: What can we do to improve our best hiking sock? Add some color to it. We added some red accents to help it stand out, but it still has the heart of a great outdoor/work sock! They are i deal to wear with boots or sneakers for trekking, climbing, hiking, motorcycle riding, or any other outdoor sport, any time of the year. ✅ ENGINEERED FOR THE ADVENTURIST IN YOU : This is a great year-round outdoor crew length sports sock. Being engineered for the demanding adventurist, this sock is lightweight on the leg with elastic for fitting and support. The alpaca fiber within it evaporates moisture, keeping feet dry throughout any activity. It has a special mesh stitch that allows air flow, evaporates moisture and prevents fungal growth, making it perfect for hiking, trekking, motorcycle riding, or any extreme other sport. ✅ GREAT COMFORT AND ALL-DAY HOLD : These unisex socks are designed for the extra comfort needed in an active day. They have got spandex in the entire sock, for a perfect fit and absence of wrinkles; extra reinforcement of alpaca cushioning on the toes, sole and heel, for back support during strenuous activities; and ribbing on the arch, for a snug fit and added support. Its special knitting keeps the nylon outside for durability, and the alpaca fiber inside for softness. ✅ MATERIAL : The fabric is made up of 44% Alpaca, 29% Micro Fiber, 9% Nylon, 12% Spandex and 6% Lycra. ✅ Made in USA.

title: Alpaca Slipper Socks
description: ✅ ALPACA SLIPPER SOCKS : This is a great sock for around the house. It has rubber treads on sole in the shape of alpacas to help prevent slipping. ✅ COMFORTABLE AND BREATHABLE : Made with a medium weight alpaca yarn, these socks are lined with terry for comfort and cushion, and will keep your feet dry and warm even after the longest day. This yarn is also blended with other synthetic fibers for strength and durability, and reinforced at the heel, toe, and foot, making the sock last a long time. ✅ VERSATILE : These socks are made in USA with a very versatile design. They come in black, gray, and rainbow. ✅ MATERIAL : The fabric is made up of 44% Alpaca, 30% Microfiber, 11% Nylon, 11% Spandex, & 4% Elastic.

It has rubber treads on sole in the shape of alpacas to help prevent slipping. ✅ COMFORTABLE AND BREATHABLE : Made with a medium weight alpaca yarn, these socks are lined with terry for comfort and cushion, and will keep your feet dry and warm even after the longest day. This yarn is also blended with other synthetic fibers for strength and durability, and reinforced at the heel, toe, and foot, making the sock last a long time. ✅ VERSATILE : These socks are made in USA with a very versatile design. They come in black, gray, and rainbow. ✅ MATERIAL : The fabric is made up of 44% Alpaca, 30% Microfiber, 11% Nylon, 11% Spandex, & 4% Elastic.

title: Winter Alpaca Extra Heavy Over the Calf High Boot Sock
description: ✅ ULTRA COMFORT ALPACA SOCKS : The softness of the yarn and the stitch make this sock breathable, comfortable, and gentle against sensitive skin. The full sole cushioned foot bottom provides extra protection and all-day comfort. The over-the-calf length creates maximum airflow to keep your feet cool and dry in any running conditions, and they provide a perfect combination of comfort and support. ✅ GREAT FOR ANY OCCASION : Great for the toughest training sessions as the alpaca fiber run dry, provide moisture control and keep your feet fresh. ✅ CALF MUCK BOOT SOCK : The combination of elastic and spandex provide increased stretch, extra heavyweight and a relaxed fit. All alpaca socks will give you the fresh feeling of wearing brand new socks every morning. Our Men & Women business/crew-length socks are suitable for office and everyday use throughout the year. ✅ FASHIONABLE AND ATTRACTIVE : These unique unisex winter socks are lovely are fashionable and attractive. They brighten up your mornings and make your toes fun all day. Designed to be all-season, as they are breathable socks for when it's warm but thick enough for when it's cold during the winter. ✅ MATERIAL : ✅ Made in USA.

title: Cardigan Knit Alpaca Beanie
description: Our Cardigan Knit Alpaca Beanie is the perfect combination of warmth and style. Made from the softest alpaca yarn, this beanie features a double-layered cardigan rib knit that provides a plush design without the weight. This knit effortlessly showcases all the wonderful properties of alpaca: warm, moisture-wicking, and incredibly soft. It's a versatile style that can be worn as a relaxed slouch beanie or cuffed for a more traditional look. This timeless piece is sure to become a favorite. Made in the USA with U.S. Grown Alpaca Content: 80% U.S. Alpaca, 20% Recycled Nylon Care Instructions: Hand Wash Cold Water, Lay Flat to Air Dry

title: Alpaca 1/2 Crew Striped Dress Sock
description: ✅ ALPACA 1/2 CREW STRIPES SOCKS : This stylish modern sock is made to wear anywhere. Manufactured in the USA from an alpaca blend, this lightweight 1/2 crew-length sock comes in multiple colored stripes. ✅ COMFORTABLE AND BREATHABLE MATERIAL : The Dress Alpaca Blend 1/2 Crew Sock is made with a special knitting that keeps the nylon outside for longer wear & durability with alpaca inside for softness. It has got extra reinforcement on the toe, sole and heel, and the spandex within the blend allows it to fit perfectly. The alpaca fiber from which it's made of also makes it a breathable sock as it evaporates moisture, keeps feet dry and prevents fungal growth. ✅ PERFECT FOR EVERY OCCASION : These unisex socks are lightweight and dressy, perfect for anytime of the year. They are great for every occasion, from business to a night on the town, as they will provide the extra comfort and style you desire. ✅ MATERIAL : The fabric is made up of 49% Alpaca, 32% Micro Fiber, 4% Nylon, 14% Spandex and 1% Lycra. And its washing machine friendly! It can be washed in cold water and dried on a gentle cycle. ✅ Made in USA.

title: The Weekender Alpaca Socks
description: Introducing The Weekender Alpaca Boot Sock – the ultimate companion for your weekend escapes and nature adventures. Crafted meticulously in the USA using U.S.-grown alpaca fiber, these boot-height socks are designed to offer unparalleled comfort and performance for the discerning explorer. Whether kayaking through serene waters, hiking rugged trails, or snowboarding down powdery slopes, The Weekender Alpaca Boot Sock ensures your feet stay warm, dry, and cushioned. Alpaca fiber, celebrated as one of Mother Nature's most advanced natural insulators, provides exceptional thermal regulation. No matter the temperature or terrain, your feet will remain comfortably cozy without overheating. The full cushion terry loop design with the reinforced nylon exoskeleton brings increased comfort and durability. This combo makes these socks a perfect fit for those seeking both adventure and some rest and relaxation. Weekend Warriors, you work hard all week, and this sock is made to support you on your quest to reset, recharge, and reconnect with the great outdoors on your weekend adventures. What adventure will the Weekender Alpaca Boot Socks take you on next? Made in the USA with U.S. Grown Alpaca The Weekender Alpaca Boot Socks are a natural fawn blend of alpaca and hunter-green nylon for reinforcement. Content: 67% U.S. Alpaca, 31% Recycled Nylon, 2% Lycra Care: Turn Inside Out and Machine Wash on Gentle Cycle with Cool Water, Tumble Dry on Low Heat or Lay Flat to Air Dry Do not use Fabric Softener and Avoid Laundering with Heavy, Bulky Items. Sizes: Small (W4-6), Medium (M6-9:W6.5-10), Large (M10-12:W10.5+), & XL (M12.5+)

title: Alpaca Extreme Hiking Sport 1/4 Crew Length Sock
description: ✅ BRAND NEW 1/4 CREW SIZE HIKING SOCKS: Need a hiking sock for the summer but don't want to give up on the Alpaca comfort? Well, we developed a 1/4 crew size hiking sock to get you outdoors in the spring, summer, and fall months. Great to wear anywhere! ✅ ENGINEERED FOR THE ADVENTURIST IN YOU: This is a great year-round outdoor 1/4 crew length sports sock. Engineered for the demanding adventurist, this sock is lightweight on the leg with elastic for fitting and support. The alpaca fiber within it wicks moisture, helping to keep feet dry throughout any activity. It has a special mesh stitch that allows air flow and helps prevent fungal growth, making it perfect for hiking, trekking, motorcycle riding, or any extreme other sport. ✅ GREAT COMFORT AND ALL-DAY HOLD: These unisex socks are designed for the extra comfort needed in any active day but are comfortable enough for everyday wear. They have spandex in the entire sock for a perfect fit and absence of wrinkles; extra reinforcement of alpaca cushioning on the toes, sole, and heel for back support during strenuous activities; and ribbing on the arch for a snug fit and added support. It's special knitting keeps the nylon outside for durability and the alpaca fiber inside for softness. ✅ MATERIAL: The fabric is made up of 44% Alpaca, 29% Micro Fiber, 9% Nylon, 12% Spandex and 6% Lycra. ✅ Made in USA.

title: Winter Alpaca Heavy Crew Length Sock
description: ✅ SUPER COMFORT ALPACA SOCKS : These alpaca crew length socks have got elastic on the leg for fitting and support, keeping the sock up and comfortable all day. They have also got ribbing on the arch for support and extra reinforcement on toe, sole, and heel for added durability. ✅ GREAT FOR ANY OCCASION : Alpaca socks fit comfortably right on your feet and can be used for office, strenuous activities and everyday use throughout every season. ✅ SUITABLE FOR OUTDOOR ACTIVITIES AND WINTER SPORTS : These unisex socks are lined with terry throughout the sock, keeping your feet warm and dry, allowing you to enjoy your activity longer. Great for hunting, hiking, skiing, and all kinds of mild to heavy winter sports or outdoor activities. Its suitable as well for the toughest training sessions as they manage moisture and keep your feet fresh. ✅ MATERIAL : The fabric is made up of 50% Alpaca, 34% Micro Fiber, 12% Nylon, and 4% Lycra. Its special knitting keeps the nylon on the outside for durability, and alpaca on the inside for a cushioned interior adding softness all around your feet. ✅ Made in USA.

description: 100% luscious baby alpaca in a beatiful rich purple bulky weight yarn. Cascade Color Number 659 Yardage: 100 g (3.5 oz) / 108 yds (98.8 m) Gauge: 14 sts = 4" (10 cm) US 10 (6 mm)

title: Geometric Patterned Alpaca Dress Sock
description: Geometric Patterned Alpaca Dress Sock These fun patterned alpaca dress sock are thicker than most of our other dress sock so they provide a bit more cushion and comfort. The fun patterns come in several colors. Features of alpaca sock INDOOR AND OUTDOOR ACTIVITIES: Run Dry Moisture Management Provides Superior Moisture Transport with our Ultra Wicking Fibers. So, whether you're in the gym or on the Road, at parties, family functions, your Feet Stay Fresh. Mesh ventilation construction creates maximum airflow to keep your feet cool and dry in any running conditions. MADE IN THE USA: My comfy alpaca socks are made in the USA. Due to the suitable length, the socks are Easily Match with All Kinds of Shoes. Made of high-quality material to keep the feet at optimal level warmth. IDEAL FOR HIKING: Our alpaca socks are great for hiking, trekking, outdoor adventures, walking, traveling, or everyday wear. These dress alpaca socks also provide comfort in work boots. Our hiking and outdoor socks are the perfect gifts for your family, friends, and children. DURABLE AND COMFORTABLE: This warm, durable and comfortable sock is perfect for any occasion. Coolness mesh lanes wick away sweat, increasing breathability while promoting odor control. Targeted and padding reduces the risk of getting blisters, aches, and aid in shock absorbance. SIZE CHART: It is based on shoe size Small women 4-6.5, Medium: women 7-10, men 6-9 Large: women 10.5+, men 9.5-12 XL: men 12. New Nordic design has a fabric with patterns that are woven, rather than printed.

title: Extra Heavy Winter Alpaca Sock
description: Made in the USA Another great sock for all kinds of cold-temperature activities. These extra heavy winter alpaca socks is ideal to wear with boots. Lined with terry throughout the sock, but engineered with a mesh weave along the sides of the sock for improved breath-ability. A silky interior that you can wear year-round thanks to Alpaca’s natural wicking properties. Don’t let the thickness deceive you! Unisex Loose Binding for super stretchy tops, ideal for those with wide calves Ribbing on arch for support Reinforced Toe & Heel for durability Alpaca cushioned interior adds softness all around your feet (Alpaca terry lining inside) Special knitting keeps nylon on the outside for durability and Alpaca fiber on the inside for softness Special mesh stitch on the sides for improved airflow Flat toe seam Ideal for boots, outdoor winter sports, and cold weather Machine washable in cold water and dry on gentle cycle

title: Equestrian Alpaca Dress Sock
description: VERSATILE SPECIALIZED SOCKS : These socks are made and designed in the USA for equestrians, as they are ideal for tall boots. They are built like a dress sock and can be used with high or fitted boots, due to its use of thin alpaca yarn. LONG-LASTING AND COMFORTABLE : The over-the-calf equestrian socks are casual and lightweight, despite having reinforcement on the heel, toe and foot. Its alpaca blend with spandex gives it a great fitting and support, while its special knitting allows it to have a greater durability. MATERIAL : The fabric is made up of 51% Alpaca, 34% Micro Fiber, 3% Nylon, 12% Spandex and 1% Lycra. Made in USA.

title: Low Cut Alpaca Sport Sock
description: PERFECT FOR HIGH-IMPACT SPORTS AND DAILY WEAR : This sports sock caters to any amateur or professional athlete, both women and men. It keeps you dry, with a soft silky touch, and meets your demanding expectations. Feel the comfort while running, walking, working, enjoying the outdoors or just relaxing in the house. LOW-CUT DESIGN : These unisex socks have a low-cut design that show just over the shoe. They are ideal for any inside/outside sport, but can also be won for your everyday needs. COMFORTABLE AND BREATHABLE MATERIAL : Made of durable, high-quality materials which have unique properties such as evaporating moisture, and keeping feet dry to prevent fungal growth. The ribbing on its arch adds support and stability and the mesh stitch improves airflow and breathability. It is reinforced in the heel and toe, and has an ultra-soft cushioned sole for enhanced impact resistance, a key feature in sport socks. MATERIAL : The fabric is made up of 42% Alpaca, 25% Acrylic, 13% Nylon, 8 % Elastic and 12% Spandex. And its washing-machine-friendly! It can be washed in cold water and dried on a gentle cycle. Made in USA.

title: Therapeutic Alpaca Socks
description: DESIGNED FOR DIABETICS : These socks are designed in the USA and made in Peru for diabetics and those with sensitive feet. They have an extra amount of stretch (150% more) in the leg to relieve the pressure and help the circulation. The top band of the sock has enough elastic built in it to keep it up with out constricting the leg, and a loose ribbing and loose knit which does not restrict circulation. You will notice the difference in your body when your feet are feeling their best. GENTLE AGAINST SENSITIVE SKIN : These are medium weight, therapeutic alpaca fiber socks that have a flat seam that reduce pressure and protect against blisters. The alpaca within the fabric helps protect from irritation, and the softness of the yarn and the stitch make this sock breathable, comfortable, and gentle against sensitive skin. SOFT ALPACA FIBER : The sock is lined with terry for comfort and cushion, and reinforced in the heel, toe, and foot for durability. It also has cushion on the foot bottom to provide extra protection and comfort. It can be worn any time of the year due to some of the characteristics of the alpaca fiber, such as wicking of moisture from the feet, keeping it dry and thus preventing fungal growth. CREW AND BOOT LENGTH : These socks come in different colors and lengths, and there's a great variety to choose from! They are available in both boot length and crew length heights, and in black, blue, brown, gray, beige, white, purple and multi colors. MATERIAL : The fabric is made up of 47% Alpaca, 38% Acrylic, 9% Nylon and 6% Elastic. And its machine washable!

The top band of the sock has enough elastic built in it to keep it up with out constricting the leg, and a loose ribbing and loose knit which does not restrict circulation. You will notice the difference in your body when your feet are feeling their best. GENTLE AGAINST SENSITIVE SKIN : These are medium weight, therapeutic alpaca fiber socks that have a flat seam that reduce pressure and protect against blisters. The alpaca within the fabric helps protect from irritation, and the softness of the yarn and the stitch make this sock breathable, comfortable, and gentle against sensitive skin. SOFT ALPACA FIBER : The sock is lined with terry for comfort and cushion, and reinforced in the heel, toe, and foot for durability. It also has cushion on the foot bottom to provide extra protection and comfort. It can be worn any time of the year due to some of the characteristics of the alpaca fiber, such as wicking of moisture from the feet, keeping it dry and thus preventing fungal growth. CREW AND BOOT LENGTH : These socks come in different colors and lengths, and there's a great variety to choose from! They are available in both boot length and crew length heights, and in black, blue, brown, gray, beige, white, purple and multi colors. MATERIAL : The fabric is made up of 47% Alpaca, 38% Acrylic, 9% Nylon and 6% Elastic. And its machine washable!

GENTLE AGAINST SENSITIVE SKIN : These are medium weight, therapeutic alpaca fiber socks that have a flat seam that reduce pressure and protect against blisters. The alpaca within the fabric helps protect from irritation, and the softness of the yarn and the stitch make this sock breathable, comfortable, and gentle against sensitive skin. SOFT ALPACA FIBER : The sock is lined with terry for comfort and cushion, and reinforced in the heel, toe, and foot for durability. It also has cushion on the foot bottom to provide extra protection and comfort. It can be worn any time of the year due to some of the characteristics of the alpaca fiber, such as wicking of moisture from the feet, keeping it dry and thus preventing fungal growth. MATERIAL : The fabric is made up of 47% Alpaca, 38% Acrylic, 9% Nylon and 6% Elastic. And its machine washable!

title: Leaf Pattern Alpaca Shawl
description: Our LEAF Shawl is made using Suri alpaca yarn, showcasing Suri fiber's natural luster and beautiful drape. The leaf pattern knit and the new suri yarn together have produced an amazingly intricate design all while being soft and luxurious to the touch. This shawl is absolutely beautiful in person, we encourage you to browse the product photos to see how it can be worn and get a feel for it's generous size. The LEAF Shawl measures approximately 22" wide by 63" long

title: Alpaca Print Crew Socks
description: Whether you're going on a hike or lounging around the house, this Alpaca Print crew sock is right for you. These thick, warm socks are made from 100% Alpaca fiber so they are mildew resistant and can dry quickly after being washed in cold water. Sizes: S/M (W5-10:M4-9), L/XL (W10+:M9-14) Composition: 60% Alpaca / 26% Acrylic / 10% Spandex / 4% Elastic.

title: Textured Alpaca Slouch Hat
description: The Textured Slouch Alpaca Beanie is made from our softest U.S. Grown Alpaca and features all over contrasting rib & cable knitting using naturally colored alpaca yarn, which creates a subtle 3-Dimensional design. The slouch beanie has that hip loose look on the top while still keeping your head warm in a wide range of conditions. The headband area features a microfleece lining, keeping the hat snug on your head and blocking wind on your forehead, ears, and neck. The top of the hat stays breathable so you feel comfortable while staying active in the great outdoors. This hat is finished with a faux suede sewn on tag, bringing the hat and the alpaca brand itself to new heights. We've designed this hat in house from the ground up to be as stylish as it is warm and cozy and we couldn't be happier with the results!

title: Teardrop Alpaca Felt Trivets
description: Mother Nature has you covered in more ways than one with our Teardrop Alpaca Felt Trivets. This versatile 5mm thick tastefully shaped alpaca felt pad can be used as a trivet, a hot pad, a coaster, a house plant tray, or even serve as the catch-all in your entryway for keys and cell phones. Alpaca’s insulating and heat-resistant properties will protect you and your surfaces while keeping that home-cooked meal hotter for longer. Alpaca is also hydrophilic, absorbing condensation before it gets a chance to leave a mark on your table, making it perfect under the pitcher of cold lemonade or under your favorite houseplant pot. Our Teardrop Alpaca Felt pads are naturally moisture and stain-resistant, making them a care-free choice for around the kitchen and home. The alpaca felt pads are naturally colored, so they will not fade over time, and the thickness and durability of the alpaca will keep it looking great for years to come. Made in the USA with U.S. Grown Alpaca Choose from Two Sizes: - Small: Approximately 9.5” H x 9.1” W, 5mm Thick - Large: Approximately 12.5” H x 11.25” W, 5mm Thick Care: Alpaca is naturally stain and moisture resistant. If needed, lightly spot clean with a mild detergent and let air dry flat.

title: Crossover Cable Alpaca Blanket
description: Our new Crossover Cable Alpaca Blanket is a perfect weight and size to wrap up with on the couch or by the campfire. We've blended soft + comforting U.S. Grown Alpaca with U.S. Grown Merino to create this locally grown, locally made all-natural addition to our offerings. Alpaca and Merino's thermal regulating properties help create a warm, soft, and cozy blanket without the excess bulk. Naturally hypoallergenic and odor resistant, your new favorite blanket will stay fresh day after day, night after night. Stay cozy naturally with this U.S. Grown, U.S. Made Alpaca Blanket + feel good knowing it supports natural fiber farms & mills across the country. Dimensions: 60" x 54" Content: 70% U.S. Alpaca, 30% U.S. Merino Care Instructions : Alpaca and Merino are both naturally stain and odor resistant, requiring little to no care with regular daily use. If needed, Spot Clean by hand to treat spots or Gentle Wash on Delicate with Cool Water, lay flat to dry. Do not wring out, hang, iron, or dry clean.

title: Slipper Alpaca Heavy Mini Crew Socks
description: ✅ ANTI-SLIP SLIPPER SOCKS : Do you ever wear your socks around the house like a slipper? Have you ever slid across your room or almost fallen? Well, these socks will prevent you from sliding around unintentionally whilst maintaining all the comfort, as they have got rubber grips on the sole to ensure traction. ✅ MINI CREW LENGHT COMFORT : These crew style socks are made in the USA with a fabric blend that allows it to be breathable, moisture-wicking, and sweat-absorbent. Its ribbing on the arch provides support and its reinforced sole allows for a greater durability. They are heavy-weight and have a terry lining inside for cushion that will ensure your feet stay warm, dry and comfortable. So much you may decide to even sleep in them! ✅ MATERIAL : The fabric is made up of 51% Alpaca, 35% Micro Fiber, 12% Nylon and 2% Lycra. And its washing-machine-friendly! ✅ Made in USA.

title: Low Pro Alpaca Sock
description: Our Low Pro Alpaca Sock is all the things you love about the Survival Sock but in a shortened version! This mid-weight full cushion low profile design has alpaca terry loops through the entire sock for cushion, comfort, and maximum moisture wicking. There is a heel tab to keep the sock in place and prevent rubbing. The arch band wraps around the entire sock for a proper fit and the heel and toe have been reinforced with nylon for increased durability. Hypo-allergenic, un-dyed, and naturally odor-resistant. Your new favorite slipper sock! Contents : 78% Alpaca, 20% Nylon, 2% Lycra. Care Instructions : Machine Wash and Dry

The arch band wraps around the entire sock for a proper fit and the heel and toe have been reinforced with nylon for increased durability. Hypo-allergenic, un-dyed, and naturally odor-resistant. Your new favorite slipper sock! Contents : 78% Alpaca, 20% Nylon, 2% Lycra. Care Instructions : Machine Wash and Dry

title: Extreme Alpaca Sport Sock
description: NEW AND IMPROVED HIKING SOCKS: What can we do to improve our best hiking sock? Add some color to it. We added some red accents to help it stand out, but it still has the heart of a great outdoor/work sock! They are i deal to wear with boots or sneakers for trekking, climbing, hiking, motorcycle riding, or any other outdoor sport, any time of the year. ENGINEERED FOR THE ADVENTURIST IN YOU : This is a great year-round outdoor crew length sports sock. Being engineered for the demanding adventurist, this sock is lightweight on the leg with elastic for fitting and support. The alpaca fiber within it evaporates moisture, keeping feet dry throughout any activity. It has a special mesh stitch that allows air flow, evaporates moisture and prevents fungal growth, making it perfect for hiking, trekking, motorcycle riding, or any extreme other sport. GREAT COMFORT AND ALL-DAY HOLD : These unisex socks are designed for the extra comfort needed in an active day. They have got spandex in the entire sock, for a perfect fit and absence of wrinkles; extra reinforcement of alpaca cushioning on the toes, sole and heel, for back support during strenuous activities; and ribbing on the arch, for a snug fit and added support. Its special knitting keeps the nylon outside for durability, and the alpaca fiber inside for softness. MATERIAL : The fabric is made up of 44% Alpaca, 29% Micro Fiber, 9% Nylon, 12% Spandex and 6% Lycra. Made in USA.

title: Big Cable Alpaca Blanket
description: The natural breathability and moisture wicking properties of the alpaca combined with the loft of the oversized cable knit pattern make a blanket that will keep you warm and comfy year round. It’s generous size, hefty weight, and lush texture, make it perfect for layering over a bed, or draping over a love seat or sectional. The evident quality and finesse of this heirloom blanket truly adds more “home” to your house. A perfect gift for someone who has it all and appreciates the best. Dimensions: 70" x 52"

title: Snowflakes Bath Bomb
description: Jack Frost nipping at your nose. An all natural blend of mint, vanill a, lavender and winter magic. This may bring back those childhood memories of outdoor fun in the snow. Makes a great stocking stuffer! Featuring: *Coconut Oil *Abyssinian Oil *Almond Oil *Grapeseed Oil

title: Three Kings All Natural Soap
description: This version of Frank and Myrrh is sweet and rich with deep earthy notes and intriguing mid notes with a golden twist! Our all natural soaps make wonderful gifts or self indulgences!

title: Mint Chocolate Swirl All Natural Soap
description: Mint Chocolate Swirl Soap Bar Natural Essential Oils of Spearmint and Peppermint couple with organic cocoa butter and chocolate for a blissful mint chocolate treat that will remind you of the popular ice cream. Our all natural soaps make wonderful gifts or self indulgences!

title: Suri Alpaca Stuffed Animal
description: Check out our amazing suri alpacas! They are made from 100% alpaca and are as soft as can be! Alpacas come in a variety of colors and so do these bears. Because of the variability of colors we sell these alpacas as assorted colors, if there is a specific color you are looking for, please contact us and we can let you know what we have in stock. Otherwise, enjoy the surprise of the color of your alpaca!

description: Our amazing elephants (or wooly mammoths, you decide!) measure approximately 13" in length. They are made from 100% alpaca and are as soft as can be!

title: Merry Mistletoe Sugar Scrub
description: Merry Mistletoe Sugar Scrub is a wonderful scrub. Notes of Citrus, Blue Spruce & Cranberry make this a festive scent. Perfect for a Christmas gift, Stocking Stuffer, Secret Santa or for yourself! Our sugar scrubs are made with a premium blend of oils, fragrance or essential oils and fair trade organic sugar. Ingredients : Organic Fair Trade Sugar, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil, Vitis Vinifera (Grape) Seed Oil, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis (Sweet Almond) Oil, Crambe Abyssinica Seed Oil, Fragrance, Rosmarinus Officinalis (Rosemary) Leaf Extract.

title: Alpaca Roving -Brulee
description: Alpaca fiber that is so very soft! This roving is a beautiful light fawn from our alpaca, Brulee. It is Huacaya roving making it light and fluffy with lots of loft and softness Our roving is perfect for felting or spinning! Available in 1/4 oz, 1 oz or 2 oz bundles. We have an option for whatever size project you are working on!

title: Patterned Stripes Alpaca Dress Sock
description: Made in the USA ALPACA CREW STRIPED SOCKS: These premium striped dress socks are perfect for your everyday needs. A beautiful gray, white and black sock in patterned stripes. Made of durable, high-quality materials 47% Alpaca, 30% Micro Fiber, 3% Nylon, 13% Spandex, and 1% Lycra to ensure an exact fit and Ideal socks provide you endless comfort and just-right fit in your foot. COMFORTABLE AND BREATHABLE MATERIAL: Our alpaca stripes socks are made USA, of comfortable and breathable material with a lightweight design. The fiber also helps keep your feet cool by absorbing up all the sweat and moisture produced by your feet. Our premium material provides our socks comfortable and breathable to protect your feet skin. PERFECT FOR SPORTS AND DAILY WEAR: These dress socks are perfect for soccer, baseball, runners, athletes, fitness workouts, gym, hiking, tennis, cycling, office workers, airplane travelers, skiing, cross-fit, and anyone who are on their feet all day! All-season Soft Alpaca socks are perfect for Christmas, birthdays, mother's day, girlfriends, daughters, and any kind of day. LIGHTWEIGHT AND COMFORT SOCKS: lightweight and dressy crew length make it perfect for any time of the year. Our men's and women's sport socks are suitable for office and everyday use throughout the year. The socks of heels and toes are reinforced to enhance durability and provide more protection. SIZE CHART: The size chart is based on shoe size: Medium: Women 7-10, Men 6-9 Large: Women 10+, Men 10-12 These Alpaca socks are made to wear with any type of shoes-steel toe, hiking, hunting, and it is built into high-impact areas for long-lasting socks and added comfort.

title: Black Currant Vanilla All Natural Soap
description: The aroma of sweet black currant softened with vanilla for a soft all natural fragrance. Our all natural soaps make wonderful gifts or self indulgences!

title: Trailblazer All Natural Soap
description: We took our fantastic insect repellent blend and added it to our hair and body soap. So take our trailblazer soap out into the wild and keep clean from head to toe while reminding those bugs you are not to be messed with! title: Cinnabee Wax Melt Tart
description: These Cinnamon scented wax melt tarts are made with pure, therapeutic grade essential oils in a beautiful spicy fragrance! Get a variety to make a fun gift set! title: Backpaca Alpaca Sock
description: Our BACKPACA Sock is a lightweight hiker sock designed for you to forget it's even on while you march through the wilderness or dance the night away. Terry loop construction along the sole of the foot provides cushion, padding, and comfort where it's most needed. The ribbed knit along the top of the foot and up the calf allow for increased breathability and moisture wicking. Dense knit construction along with arch and ankle support bands keep the sock tightly in place throughout the day without bunching, slipping, or blisters on the trail. U.S. Alpaca will keep it's temperature regulating properties both when dry or wet. It's also naturally antimicrobial, bacteria and odor resistant, making it a perfect fit for that next long outdoor adventure. If you love U.S. Alpaca Socks and have wished for a lightweight, less bulky option, particularly in those warmer climates and months then this is the sock for you! Sizes: Small (W4-6.5) Medium (M6-8.5;W7-9.5) Large (M9-11.5;W10-12.5) XL (M12+) Contents : 60% U.S. Alpaca, 35% Recylced Nylon, and 5% Lycra. Care Instructions: Gentle Wash & Tumble Low - See Label for Details

description: Wake up and start your day with this pumice scrub soap. Essential oils of frankincense , peppermint and basil add a bright and clean scent that compliments the uplifting citrus oils of lemon and bergamot. On top of that fantastic scent is potent but not too aggressive pumice that adds just the right amount of grit to exfoliate and clean your skin.

title: Backpaca Ankle Alpaca Sock
description: Our BACKPACA Sock is a lightweight hiker sock designed for you to forget it's even on while you march through the wilderness or dance the night away. Terry loop construction along the sole of the foot provides cushion, padding, and comfort where it's most needed. The ribbed knit along the top of the foot and up the calf allow for increased breathability and moisture wicking. Dense knit construction along with arch and ankle support bands keep the sock tightly in place throughout the day without bunching, slipping, or blisters on the trail. U.S. Alpaca will keep it's temperature regulating properties both when dry or wet. It's also naturally antimicrobial, bacteria and odor resistant, making it a perfect fit for that next long outdoor adventure. If you love U.S. Alpaca Socks and have wished for a lightweight, less bulky option, particularly in those warmer climates and months then this is the sock for you! Sizes: Small (W4-6.5) Medium (M6-8.5;W7-9.5) Large (M9-11.5;W10-12.5) XL (M12+) Contents : 60% U.S. Alpaca, 35% Recylced Nylon, and 5% Lycra. title: Striped Thick Dress Socks
description: A simple way to keep your feet warm and dry! These Striped but stylish Socks are designed for everyday use and for all occasions. Durable, soft and very comfortable, these Socks provide wicking properties & perfect fit. They can also be machine washed or dried. Composition: 62% Alpaca/ 27% Acrylic/ 9% Nylon/ 2% Elastic.

title: Boucle Fingerless Alpaca Gloves
description: These fingerless alpaca gloves are so soft, luxurious and warm! They are extra long so your wrists are protected from the cold. The boucle knit is extra soft and cozy and you can still use your fingers with these gloves. No more having to take your gloves off everytime your phone dings! Available in Black

title: Alpaca Gloves
description: Alpaca is warmer than wool and as soft as cashmere. These gloves are soft and lovely. These gloves are well made and definitely warm (I find mine thin enough to wear as a liner layer under my leather work gloves). Available in a variety of sizes and colors

title: Survival Alpaca Socks
description: The Survival Sock is a terry loop lined mid-weight sock designed for a wide range of outdoor activities and climates. The soft alpaca terry loops are combined with a durable nylon outer shell. Reinforced foot arch band and a ribbed knit ankle support ensure a proper fit every time. This warm and comfortable sock is one our best selling styles! Hypo-allergenic, un-dyed, and odor resistant. They are available in a variety of colors: Tan, Dark Brown and Purple Contents: 78% U.S. Alpaca, 20% Nylon, and 2% Lycra.

This warm and comfortable sock is one our best selling styles! Hypo-allergenic, un-dyed, and odor resistant. They are available in a variety of colors: Tan, Dark Brown and Purple Contents: 78% U.S. Alpaca, 20% Nylon, and 2% Lycra.

title: Winter Alpaca Heavy Mini Crew Sock
description: ✅ EXTRA COMFORT : Winter Alpaca Blend Heavy Mini Crew Socks has a cushioned interior that adds softness all around the feet and a flat toe seam. It has also got both elastic on the leg and ribbing on the arch for fit, support and added comfort. ✅ LONG-LASTING : These socks have the heel, foot, and toe reinforced with extra material and its US-made fabric has a special knitting that keeps nylon on the outside for extra durability. ✅ MINI CREW LENGTH SOCKS : Just like its sister, the LC201, these crew length socks are lined with terry throughout the inside of the sock, keeping your feet dry, warm, and super comfortable. Both are built the same way; the main difference between these two lies on its length, this one having a lower cut and therefore being shorter. They can be easily used with tennis shoes or boots. ✅ BEST VALUE : These unique mini crew length socks are perfect for anyone and at anytime. They can be used for all kinds of activities, from training to wearing inside home and sleeping, and seniors will love them for their warmth and comfort. Alpaca socks are designed to be all-season, they are breathable socks for when it's warm but thick enough for when it's cold during the winter. ✅ MATERIAL : The fabric is made up of 50% Alpaca, 33% Micro Fiber, 13% Nylon, and 4% Lycra.

title: Therapeutic Alpaca Socks
description: DESIGNED FOR DIABETICS : These socks are designed in the USA and made in Peru for diabetics and those with sensitive feet. They have an extra amount of stretch (150% more) in the leg to relieve the pressure and help the circulation. The top band of the sock has enough elastic built in it to keep it up with out constricting the leg, and a loose ribbing and loose knit which does not restrict circulation. You will notice the difference in your body when your feet are feeling their best. GENTLE AGAINST SENSITIVE SKIN : These are medium weight, therapeutic alpaca fiber socks that have a flat seam that reduce pressure and protect against blisters. The alpaca within the fabric helps protect from irritation, and the softness of the yarn and the stitch make this sock breathable, comfortable, and gentle against sensitive skin. SOFT ALPACA FIBER : The sock is lined with terry for comfort and cushion, and reinforced in the heel, toe, and foot for durability. It also has cushion on the foot bottom to provide extra protection and comfort. It can be worn any time of the year due to some of the characteristics of the alpaca fiber, such as wicking of moisture from the feet, keeping it dry and thus preventing fungal growth. CREW AND BOOT LENGTH : These socks come in different colors and lengths, and there's a great variety to choose from! They are available in both boot length and crew length heights, and in black, blue, brown, gray, beige, white, purple and multi colors. MATERIAL : The fabric is made up of 47% Alpaca, 38% Acrylic, 9% Nylon and 6% Elastic. And its machine washable!

title: Therapeutic Alpaca Socks
description: DESIGNED FOR DIABETICS : These socks are designed in the USA and made in Peru for diabetics and those with sensitive feet. They have an extra amount of stretch (150% more) in the leg to relieve the pressure and help the circulation. The top band of the sock has enough elastic built in it to keep it up with out constricting the leg, and a loose ribbing and loose knit which does not restrict circulation. You will notice the difference in your body when your feet are feeling their best. GENTLE AGAINST SENSITIVE SKIN : These are medium weight, therapeutic alpaca fiber socks that have a flat seam that reduce pressure and protect against blisters.
